---
title: "from_mcmc"
---

Routines for reading data from the MCMC runs with this library:
https://github.com/HISKP-LQCD/su2

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`nested_sampling/from_mcmc.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/nested_sampling/from_mcmc.py)
:::


## API Reference

### `Plaquette` {#plaquette}

```python
class Plaquette
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/nested_sampling/from_mcmc.py#L11){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `Plaquette.read` {#plaquette-read}

```python
def read(path: str, nrows: int=None, skiprows: int=None)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/nested_sampling/from_mcmc.py#L13){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

### `Polyakov` {#polyakov}

```python
class Polyakov
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/nested_sampling/from_mcmc.py#L19){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `Polyakov.read` {#polyakov-read}

```python
def read(path: str, nrows: int=None, skiprows: int=None)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/nested_sampling/from_mcmc.py#L21){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
